candidate_profile.narrative: M.S. CS candidate with production experience in full-stack web services, open-source infrastructure tooling, and ML research. Currently focused on full-stack engineering and AI-assisted developer tools.

portrays_well: AI/LLM integration — OpenAI API, LangChain, agent tooling
Cloud infrastructure — Docker, Terraform, CI/CD pipelines
Research credibility — IEEE publication, formal methods coursework
not_this: Do not pitch as PM or TPM
Do not claim C++ production expertise

target_posture.auth_urgency: Authorized to work in the US.

_meta.format: Bullet formula: "Built A doing B using C, which produced D". Impact mandatory.
_meta.usage: v2.4: generated scripts pass title/company/location/dates inline — WORK_META no longer needed. All bullets pre-validated at 116 chars max.
bullet_rules: Max 116 chars WITH spaces — hard limit
Lead with varied non-repeated action verbs
IMPACT IS MANDATORY: every bullet must answer "so what?"

resume_rules:
## Resume Hard Constraints
- tagline: <=76 characters WITH spaces
- Each bullet: <=116 characters WITH spaces
- Action verb variety: no two bullets start with same verb
- Impact mandatory: every bullet needs >=1 metric or result
fabrication_warnings: All metrics are illustrative examples. Replace with your actual data before use.
